rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Pipeline stage names (taskify, build, etc.) differ from task names — the task itself is numbered (2338-260417-220513) and gets sub-stages.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"convention","text":"taskify stage summarises the plan BEFORE the build runs, noting risk level and scope (e.g. 'single file, low risk').","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Simple content additions use targeted line-based edits (e.g. append before a heading at a known line number).","scope":"build stage"}]}
